name: Scarlett
text: During battle, your opponent’s hit dice must match to hit this creature. Does not include "Snake Eyes". This creature’s AL cannot increase.

condition.text: Opponent is rolling to hit Scarlett during battle.

effects.actionText: Opponent hit dice must match to hit Scarlett
effects.value: Opponent's hit dice must be matching values to hit; Snake Eyes does not count

duration.text: While this card remains on the field

effects.notes: Requires battle hit-roll metadata. Double 1 remains Snake Eyes/critical miss and cannot satisfy this requirement.
